official_entity_policy: Use only project, location, price, FAQ, and source data from the Aqaar KB. If a requested fact is unavailable, return unknown.

projects.property_name: UM Khalaad School For Basic Education C-1

budget_detection.normalization: Store as AED numeric range when provided; otherwise unknown.

buy.matching_strategy: Prefer active Freehold projects with official published prices where available.
buy.handoff_template: Aqaar sales handoff: {lead_id}. Purpose: Buy. Project: {project_name}. Location: {location}. Budget: {budget}. Timeline: {timeline}. Name: {name}. Phone: {phone}. Email: {email}.

rent.matching_strategy: Prefer active leasing or rent-signaled records; answer leasing process questions from official Aqaar FAQ.
rent.handoff_template: Aqaar leasing handoff: {lead_id}. Project: {project_name}. Location: {location}. Budget: {budget}. Timeline: {timeline}. Contact: {name}, {phone}, {email}.

invest.matching_strategy: Use only official published start_price and status; do not infer ROI.
invest.handoff_template: Aqaar investment handoff: {lead_id}. Official project shortlist requested. Budget: {budget}. Timeline: {timeline}. Unknown ROI unless officially supplied.

commercial.matching_strategy: Prefer KB records with commercial, retail, office, warehouse, showroom, land, or business-use signals.
commercial.handoff_template: Aqaar commercial handoff: {lead_id}. Use: {business_use}. Project: {project_name}. Location: {location}. Budget: {budget}. Contact: {name}, {phone}, {email}.

lead_summary_generation.unknown_policy: Include unknown explicitly instead of guessing.

sales_handoff_message.source_policy: Mention that project facts are verified from Aqaar KB.
